nyc.today_detail: Partly sunny. High near 62, with temperatures falling to around 60 in the afternoon. West wind 5 to 9 mph.

miami.label: Miami
miami.today_forecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
miami.today_detail: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Partly sunny. High near 93, with temperatures falling to around 89 in the afternoon. Heat index values as high as 100. South wind 1 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
